ddls:
CREATE TABLE "waste_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste product */,
  "prod_alias" TEXT /* Alias or common name of the waste product */,
  "prod_transcost" REAL /* Transportation cost associated with the waste product */,
  "drying_coeff" REAL /* Drying coefficient for the waste product */,
  "CH4_emissions" REAL /* Methane emissions per unit of waste product */,
  "CO2_emissions" REAL /* Carbon dioxide emissions per unit of waste product */,
  "moisture_content" REAL /* Moisture content of the waste product */,
  "volatile_solids" REAL /* Volatile solids content of the waste product */,
  "ash_content" REAL /* Ash content of the waste product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the waste product (e.g., organic, inorganic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, researcher, policymaker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_management_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each management strategy */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product associated with this strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the management strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the management strategy */,
  "implementation_cost" REAL /* Implementation cost of the strategy */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_management_strategies_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product associated with this report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_CH4" REAL /* Total methane emissions recorded in the report */,
  "total_CO2" REAL /* Total carbon dioxide emissions recorded in the report */,
  "reporting_authority" TEXT /* Authority responsible for reporting emissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user implementing the practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agricultural practice */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the practice on emissions or waste management */,
  "practice_type" TEXT /* Type of practice (e.g., crop rotation, cover cropping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_practices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission factor */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product associated with the factor */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emission (e.g., CH4, CO2) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the emission factor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the emission factor (e.g., kg/ton, g/m3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_factors_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation cost entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product */,
  "transport_distance" REAL /* Distance for transportation (in km) */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of transportation per unit */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transportation (e.g., truck, train, ship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_costs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions estimate */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product associated with this estimate */,
  "estimate_date" TEXT /* Date of the estimate */,
  "estimated_CH4" REAL /* Estimated methane emissions */,
  "estimated_CO2" REAL /* Estimated carbon dioxide emissions */,
  "estimation_method" TEXT /* Method used for estimation (e.g., IPCC, EPA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_estimates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product associated with this record */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance record */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding compliance */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body responsible for compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste generation entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date of waste generation */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of waste generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_generation_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_disposal" (
  "disposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste disposal entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product */,
  "disposal_date" TEXT /* Date of waste disposal */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of waste disposal (e.g., landfill, incineration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_disposal_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_treatment" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waste treatment entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date of waste treatment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of waste treatment (e.g., composting, anaerobic digestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waste_treatment_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the waste product */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES waste_products ("product_id")
)
